arts.ttl: Chelsea injury news and return dates for West Ham including James update
arts.sum: He returned to training this week though and has been seen taking part once more with his teammates ahead of the trip to West Ham. Chelsea wrote in an update on Wednesday that he and Lavia "continued their rehabilitation on Tuesday with another modified session as they continue their recovery from injury." Here, football.london has the latest injury news and updates from the Chelsea treatment room ahead of the game.

arts.ttl: “No surprise” | David Moyes could make a return to struggling former club
arts.sum: Former West Ham United captain Nigel Reo-Coker has tipped David Moyes to make a sensational return to Everton after a very poor start to the season under Sean Dyche. Moyes managed Everton for eleven years between 2002 and 2013, winning 221 times in 518 matches. In fact, David Moyes had a 0.1 better points per... arts.ttl: Gary Neville makes enormous Chelsea manager U-turn after surprise change
arts.sum: Gary Neville has claimed that Mauricio Pochettino needed the US Men's national team role after 'falling out of love' with football management following ill-fated spells at Chelsea and Paris Saint-Germain. "I do actually think Chelsea - if they can get to the end of the season which they obviously will and they can appoint a manager in the summer and the talk is of Pochettino - someone will be able to mould them into a decent team," he admitted.

arts.ttl: “I’m not sure” | Pundit slams West Ham Lopetegui appointment
arts.sum: West Ham have been criticised for their appointment to replace David Moyes, by pundit Chris Sutton. The former striker was providing his weekly preview and prediction of the Premier League football, however this week he took a swipe at the appointment of new Head Coach Julen Lopetegui. “West Ham supposedly replaced David Moyes because they... arts.ttl: Chelsea set to apply for agent's £3m High Court claim relating to Kurt Zouma's previous move to West Ham quashed over incorrect filing
arts.sum: SAMI MOKBEL: Chelsea will apply to have agent Saif Rubie's £3million High Court claim thrown out, claiming the case has been incorrectly filed and should be dealt with by the Football Association.

arts.ttl: Chelsea predicted lineup vs West Ham
arts.sum: Fresh after not playing a game in midweek, the Blues are looking to build on last weekend's dramatic win over Bournemouth, where Christopher Nkunku grabbed the points with a strike in the 86th minute. Chelsea will aim to keep pace with the early chasing pack in the Premier League when they visit West Ham United in Saturday's Premier League opener.
